commands.review_summary:
The PR makes Feishu bot identity probing return an explicit aborted result, stops aborted startup before applying empty identity state, and adds a regression test for replacement identity preservation.

PR surface: Source +24, Tests +41. Total +65 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main returns empty identity on abort, applies that state, and skips recovery when the lifecycle signal is aborted. I did not run a live Feishu tenant reload.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual proof gate: contributor or maintainer needs to add real Feishu reload evidence or explicitly override the proof gap; there is no narrow code repair to queue.

target.title: fix(feishu): preserve identity on aborted startup probe
target.body:
Closes #77717

## What Problem This Solves

Fixes an issue where users running Feishu WebSocket accounts could have a config reload abort the startup bot identity probe, causing the stopped lifecycle to write an unknown bot identity and skip recovery. Affected accounts could miss messages until a full gateway restart.

## Why This Change Was Made

The Feishu startup probe now distinguishes a resolved identity result from an abort-driven cancellation. Aborted probes stop monitor startup before applying empty identity state, while active lifecycles with genuinely unknown identity still schedule the existing background recovery path.

This stays inside the Feishu monitor lifecycle boundary. It does not change core gateway behavior, config shape, or Feishu credentials handling.

AI-assisted: yes, implemented with Codex.

## User Impact

Feishu accounts are protected from stale aborted startup probes clearing replacement identity during reloads. Operators should no longer need a full gateway restart to recover from this race when the replacement monitor lifecycle has already written fresh identity state.

Existing timeout and non-abort unknown-identity behavior remains recovery-based for active lifecycles.

## Evidence

- `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile` to hydrate the new worktree before validation
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/feishu/src/monitor.startup.test.ts extensions/feishu/src/monitor.cleanup.test.ts extensions/feishu/src/monitor.reaction.test.ts` - 3 files / 43 tests passed
- `pnpm tsgo:extensions` - passed
- `pnpm tsgo:extensions:test` - passed
- `pnpm format:check extensions/feishu/src/monitor.account.ts extensions/feishu/src/monitor.bot-identity.ts extensions/feishu/src/monitor.startup.test.ts extensions/feishu/src/monitor.startup.ts extensions/feishu/src/monitor.ts` - passed
- `git diff --check` - passed
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` - clean, no actionable findings

Not run: live Feishu tenant restart/reload proof; Feishu credentials were not available in this environment.
